source_pr.title: *: fix static pruning partition table in disaggregated tiflash mode
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #40239

Problem Summary: Enable mpp for static pruing partition table in disaggregated tiflash mode.


### What is changed and how it works?
1. find_best_task.go: Enable mppTask for static pruning partition table
2. fragment.go: For static pruning partition table, when build kvRange for MPPTask of TableScan, make it just as single table.
3. mpp_gather.go: Ignore correct table id in dagReq, because it's already setup properly when building pb.
### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test: Also more cases in test-infra : https://github.com/pingcap/endless/pull/1282/files#diff-cd88630a5d404279dd7eb7cb9d0d7d3a8fb3eddc5cc11e7a3b2e47274db5ca88R101
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("explain select max( tbl_1.col_1 ) as r0 , sum( tbl_1.col_1 ) as r1 , sum( tbl_1.col_8 ) as r2 from tbl_1 where tbl_1.col_8 != 68 or tbl_1.col_3 between null and 939 order by r0,r1,r2 ;") (executor/tiflashtest/tiflash_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("explain select max( tbl_1.col_1 ) as r0 , sum( tbl_1.col_1 ) as r1 , sum( tbl_1.col_8 ) as r2 from tbl_1 where tbl_1.col_8 != 68 or tbl_1.col_3 between null and 939 order by r0,r1,r2 ;") (executor/tiflashtest/tiflash_test.go)
fix_pattern: tk.MustQuery("explain select max( tbl_1.col_1 ) as r0 , sum( tbl_1.col_1 ) as r1 , sum( tbl_1.col_8 ) as r2 from tbl_1 where tbl_1.col_8 != 68 or tbl_1.col_3 between null and 939 order by r0,r1,r2 ;") (executor/tiflashtest/tiflash_test.go)

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("explain select max( tbl_1.col_1 ) as r0 , sum( tbl_1.col_1 ) as r1 , sum( tbl_1.col_8 ) as r2 from tbl_1 where tbl_1.col_8 != 68 or tbl_1.col_3 between null and 939 order by r0,r1,r2 ;") (executor/tiflashtest/tiflash_test.go)

files: ddl/placement/common.go, domain/domain.go, executor/mpp_gather.go, executor/tiflashtest/tiflash_test.go, kv/mpp.go, planner/core/find_best_task.go, planner/core/fragment.go, planner/core/planbuilder.go, planner/core/task.go, store/gcworker/gc_worker.go
